# PR: Add Ignored Build Step script for Vercel

## Summary

Adds `scripts/should_build.sh` which Vercel can use as the "Ignored Build Step" to skip builds when only non-build files change.

## Changes

- New script: `scripts/should_build.sh` — returns exit code `1` when a build should run, `0` to skip.
- Documentation: updated `SECRETS_SETUP.md` with exact Vercel UI command and notes.

## Why

Reducing unnecessary builds saves CI minutes and speeds up deployment cycles while ensuring builds run for frontend/backend changes.

## Testing

- The script is conservative by default (triggers a build if SHAs are missing).
- To test locally: run the script in a clone where `VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA` and `VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA` are set to commits you want to compare.

## Follow-ups

- If you prefer a different set of trigger paths, update the `TRIGGERS` variable in the script.

---
_This PR was generated by an automation to add a Vercel ignored-build helper and docs._
